Class BridgeDevToolsEvent

Namespace
Agibuild.Fulora
Assembly
Agibuild.Fulora.Core.dll

Represents a single bridge call event captured for the DevTools panel.

public sealed record BridgeDevToolsEvent : IEquatable<BridgeDevToolsEvent>
Inheritance
object
BridgeDevToolsEvent
Implements
IEquatable<BridgeDevToolsEvent>
Inherited Members
object.Equals(object)
object.Equals(object, object)
object.GetHashCode()
object.GetType()
object.ReferenceEquals(object, object)
object.ToString()

Properties

Direction

Call direction: Export (JS→C#) or Import (C#→JS).

[JsonConverter(typeof(JsonStringEnumConverter))]
public BridgeCallDirection Direction { get; init; }

Property Value

BridgeCallDirection

ElapsedMs

Elapsed time in milliseconds (only for End/Error phases).

public long? ElapsedMs { get; init; }

Property Value

long?

ErrorMessage

Error message if the call failed.

public string? ErrorMessage { get; init; }

Property Value

string

Id

Monotonically increasing event ID within the collector session.

public long Id { get; init; }

Property Value

long

MethodName

Method name (e.g. "getCurrentUser").

public string MethodName { get; init; }

Property Value

string

ParamsJson

Serialized params JSON (truncated if larger than threshold).

public string? ParamsJson { get; init; }

Property Value

string

Phase

Bridge lifecycle phase.

[JsonConverter(typeof(JsonStringEnumConverter))]
public BridgeCallPhase Phase { get; init; }

Property Value

BridgeCallPhase

ResultJson

Result type name or serialized result (truncated).

public string? ResultJson { get; init; }

Property Value

string

ServiceName

Service name (e.g. "AppService").

public string ServiceName { get; init; }

Property Value

string

Timestamp

UTC timestamp when the event was recorded.

public DateTimeOffset Timestamp { get; init; }

Property Value

DateTimeOffset

Truncated

True if the payload was truncated to fit the buffer threshold.

public bool Truncated { get; init; }

Property Value

bool
